title: Getting Started with Templates
content: Step by step guide to install and customize templates. Learn how to set up your first template, customize the design, and launch your website.
author: AmkyawDev

title: Customizing 3D Effects
content: Learn how to customize Three.js 3D effects in your templates. Includes examples of particle systems, animations, and interactive elements.
author: AmkyawDev

title: Firebase Authentication Setup
content: Complete guide to setting up Firebase authentication for your templates. Includes Google, Email/Password, and social login configurations.
author: AmkyawDev

title: API Reference
content: Complete API reference for all template functions. Includes endpoints, parameters, and example responses.
author: AmkyawDev

title: Frequently Asked Questions
content: Common questions and answers about templates, pricing, customization, and support.
author: AmkyawDev

title: Deploying to Firebase Hosting
content: Learn how to deploy your template to Firebase Hosting. Step by step guide with commands and configuration.
author: AmkyawDev
